title: phaseolus leptostachyus var. intonsus
intro: Phaseolus leptostachyus var. intonsus is a variety of the Phaseolus leptostachyus plant, commonly known as a type of climbing bean or a wild bean species. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting cardiovascular health. In traditional medicine, Phaseolus leptostachyus var. intonsus is prepared as a tea or decoction by infusing the leaves and stems in hot water to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
